title: packet_loss_egress
description: Detect packet loss with egress breakdown by source IP
spl: index=netops sourcetype=interface_stats device="$device$" earliest=-15m | stats sum(drops) as drops, sum(bytes) as bytes by src_ip | eval drop_pct=round(drops/(drops+bytes)*100,2) | sort -drops

title: egress_concentration
description: Identify single-source egress concentration above threshold
spl: index=netops earliest=-15m | stats sum(bytes) as total by src_ip | eventstats sum(total) as grand | eval pct=round(total/grand*100,1) | where pct > 50 | sort -pct

title: bgp_flap_detection
description: Detect BGP peer resets within a time window
spl: index=netops sourcetype=bgp_events device="$device$" earliest=-2h | stats count as flaps, values(reason) as reasons by peer | where flaps >= 2 | sort -flaps

title: bgp_keepalive_config
description: Check BGP keepalive timer configuration vs peer expectation
spl: index=netops sourcetype=bgp_config device="$device$" | eval mismatch=if(keepalive_timer!=peer_keepalive,"YES","NO") | table device peer keepalive_timer peer_keepalive mismatch last_modified

title: cpu_spike_by_process
description: Break down CPU utilization by process on a device
spl: index=netops sourcetype=device_health device="$device$" earliest=-15m | stats max(cpu_pct) as peak_cpu by process | sort -peak_cpu | head 10

title: unknown_process_audit
description: Audit unknown processes — network connections and file activity
spl: index=netops sourcetype=process_audit pid=$pid$ OR parent_pid=$pid$ | table _time pid parent_pid user cmd net_connections file_writes | sort _time

title: interface_error_counters
description: Interface error counters — CRC, input drops, output drops
spl: index=netops sourcetype=interface_stats device="$device$" interface="$interface$" earliest=-30m | stats sum(crc_errors) as crc, sum(input_drops) as in_drops, sum(output_drops) as out_drops by interface | sort -out_drops

title: threat_intel_join
description: Join source IPs against threat intelligence feed
spl: index=netops earliest=-15m | stats sum(bytes) by src_ip, dest_ip | join src_ip [search index=threat_intel] | eval threat_score=coalesce(threat_score,0) | where threat_score > 5 | sort -threat_score

title: sustained_cpu_alert
description: Detect CPU sustained above threshold for N minutes
spl: index=netops sourcetype=device_health device="$device$" | streamstats window=5 avg(cpu_pct) as avg_cpu | where avg_cpu > 85 | table _time device avg_cpu

title: route_withdrawal
description: Detect BGP route withdrawals — count and affected prefixes
spl: index=netops sourcetype=bgp_events event_type=route_withdrawal earliest=-2h | stats count as withdrawals, values(prefix) as prefixes by peer | sort -withdrawals

title: memory_utilization
description: Device memory utilization trend over time
spl: index=netops sourcetype=device_health device="$device$" earliest=-1h | timechart span=5m avg(mem_pct) as avg_mem

title: vlan_traffic_breakdown
description: Traffic breakdown by VLAN on a device
spl: index=netops sourcetype=vlan_stats device="$device$" earliest=-15m | stats sum(bytes) as bytes, sum(packets) as packets by vlan_id | sort -bytes

title: flow_anomaly_timechart
description: Traffic anomaly detection — timechart with stddev baseline
spl: index=netops sourcetype=flow_data device="$device$" earliest=-2h | timechart span=5m sum(bytes) as traffic | streamstats avg(traffic) as avg, stdev(traffic) as sd | eval anomaly=if(traffic > avg+2*sd,"YES","NO")

title: auth_failure_spike
description: Authentication failure spike — potential brute force
spl: index=security sourcetype=auth_log earliest=-15m | stats count as failures by src_ip, user | where failures > 10 | sort -failures

title: dns_exfil_pattern
description: DNS exfiltration detection — unusually long query names
spl: index=netops sourcetype=dns_log earliest=-15m | eval qname_len=len(query) | where qname_len > 50 | stats count as suspicious_queries, values(query) as samples by src_ip | sort -suspicious_queries

title: snmp_poll_storm
description: SNMP poll storm detection — excessive OID requests
spl: index=netops sourcetype=snmp_log earliest=-15m | stats count as poll_count by src_ip, oid | where poll_count > 500 | sort -poll_count

title: interface_flap
description: Interface up/down flapping within time window
spl: index=netops sourcetype=syslog "Interface" ("up" OR "down") device="$device$" earliest=-1h | rex "Interface (?<iface>\S+) (?<state>up|down)" | stats count as state_changes by iface | where state_changes > 2

title: netflow_top_talkers
description: Top talkers by bytes transferred — identify heavy hitters
spl: index=netops sourcetype=netflow earliest=-15m | stats sum(bytes) as total_bytes by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -total_bytes | head 20 | eval total_mb=round(total_bytes/1024/1024,2)

title: firmware_version_check
description: Check firmware versions across devices — spot outliers
spl: index=netops sourcetype=device_inventory | stats values(firmware_version) as versions, count by device_model | where mvcount(versions) > 1

title: syslog_error_burst
description: Syslog error burst — count ERROR/CRIT messages by device
spl: index=netops sourcetype=syslog (severity=ERROR OR severity=CRITICAL) earliest=-15m | stats count as errors by device, severity | sort -errors | head 20
